data.title: Solana's Staking Rate Reaches Record High
data.description: Solana's staking rate has reached a historic peak of 68.8%. According to PANews, this milestone highlights the growing interest and participation in the Solana network. The increase in staking activity reflects the network's expanding ecosystem and the confidence of its users in the platform's potential.

data.title: Solana's collateral ratio rose to 68.8%, a record high.
data.description: Data shows that Solana's staking ratio has risen to 68.8%, a record high. (Blockworks)

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessant: The Federal Reserve lost billions of dollars due to inappropriate timing of asset purchases.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant stated that the Federal Reserve has lost billions of dollars due to inappropriate timing of asset purchases, that Powell's appearance at the Supreme Court hearing on Cook was a mistake, and that the Fed's monetary independence is crucial. President Trump is expected to make a decision on the Fed chair as early as next week; we now have only four candidates left. (Jinshi)

data.title: BlackRock's PFF ETF already holds $380 million worth of Strategy preferred stock.
data.description: Strategy's perpetual preferred stock Stretch (STRC) has become the fourth largest holding in the BlackRock iShares Preferred and Income Securities ETF (PPF ETF), with an allocation of $210 million. The ETF also holds several other Strategy preferred stocks, totaling approximately $380 million, including: 1. $97.5 million in Strife (STRF), with a weighting of 0.69%; 2. $90 million in MSTR common stock, with a weighting of 0.64%; and 3. $73 million in Stride (STRD), with a weighting of 0.51%. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: Multiple indicators are simultaneously strengthening; $90,000 for Bitcoin becomes a watershed between bulls and bears.
data.description: Bitcoin is consolidating above $90,000, with multiple on-chain and market sentiment indicators showing signs of improvement, potentially signaling a "buy" opportunity. Market focus is on whether this key support level can hold. On-chain, the Hash Ribbons indicator shows that the miner capitulation phase is nearing its end and transitioning into a hashrate recovery phase. This indicator, based on the 30-day and 60-day moving averages of the network hashrate, has historically issued positive signals after miner selling pressure subsided and before a new round of price increases. Capriole Investments points out that the current price range is more aligned with a long-term investment strategy. On-Chain Mind also states that this is one of the strongest Hash Ribbons signals they have recorded, typically indicating a decrease in forced selling. Regarding sentiment indicators, the Fear & Greed Index has shown structural improvement. CryptoQuant data shows that its 30-day moving average has crossed above the 90-day moving average, forming a typical "golden cross." This pattern often appears after a prolonged period of market downturn and price compression, historically accompanied by several weeks of rebound. From a technical perspective, $90,000 is considered the core level of the current battle between bulls and bears. BTC is currently trading in the $90,000 to $92,000 range, which coincides with both the 4-hour 200-period moving average and key weekly support. Analysts believe that as long as this level holds, the bullish structure remains intact; however, if the weekly chart falls below $90,000, the price may retrace to the $80,000 to $85,000 range, with further support levels around $74,500 and the 200-week moving average. Overall, the simultaneous improvement in on-chain data, sentiment signals, and technical patterns makes $90,000 a crucial level determining Bitcoin's short- to medium-term trend. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Blockchain Adoption Grows Amid U.S. Regulatory Uncertainty
data.description: Despite ongoing regulatory uncertainty in the U.S. with delays to the Clarity Act, blockchain adoption continues to grow robustly across institutional finance. According to NS3.AI, major financial institutions are expanding their use of tokenized products and on-chain infrastructure even without clear market structure legislation. Analysts caution that regulatory setbacks may slow adoption and reduce competitiveness but highlight resilient institutional momentum as a key driver.

data.title: Blockchain's Potential to Address AI Amnesia and Enhance AI Systems
data.description: Current AI systems face a challenge known as 'AI amnesia,' where each session fails to remember past interactions, leading to inefficiencies. According to NS3.AI, blockchain technology could offer a solution by providing a persistent, verifiable, and user-owned memory layer. This would enable AI platforms to securely and contextually share data. Such a memory infrastructure could unlock new AI applications, including multi-agent collaboration, longitudinal learning, and auditability. This development has the potential to become blockchain's next significant application beyond the financial sector.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Hong Kong securities industry groups oppose tightening rules for crypto asset management licenses; 2. A new address withdrew 6,000 ETH from Bybit and deposited it into Aave, worth $19.03 million; 3. MegaETH will launch its public mainnet on January 22 and begin global stress testing; 4. X's new algorithm is officially open source, and Musk says it will continue to make significant improvements; 5. Binance Alpha: HeyElsa (ELSA) trading will begin on January 20 at 16:00, with an airdrop application threshold of 235 points; 6. Binance Alpha will launch FIGHT on January 22; 7. Two whales established $31.18 million in ETH long positions and $11.96 million in ETH short positions on HyperLiquid, respectively.

data.title: Portugal Bans Political Betting, Orders Polymarket to Cease Operations
data.description: Portugal has officially prohibited betting on political events, leading the country's regulator to demand that Polymarket halt its operations within 48 hours. According to NS3.AI, this decision places Portugal among a growing list of nations intensifying their regulatory oversight on decentralized prediction markets. The move underscores the increasing scrutiny faced by crypto platforms that provide political betting services.

data.title: Hyperscale Data's Bitcoin holdings have surpassed 545 coins, with a market value exceeding $50 million.
data.description: Hyperscale Data, a NYSE American company, announced that its Bitcoin treasury holdings have increased to 545.4218 BTC, with a total market value of approximately $51.1 million. Of this, 534.4224 BTC are held by its wholly-owned subsidiary Sentinum (including 440.2341 BTC acquired on the open market and approximately 94.1883 BTC from its Bitcoin mining operations, and 10.9994 BTC acquired on the open market by another subsidiary, ACG). The company aims to reach a Bitcoin value of $100 million on its balance sheet. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Portuguese regulators ordered Polymarket to cease operations in the country within 48 hours.
data.description: Portugal's betting regulator, SRIJ, has ordered the blockchain-based prediction market Polymarket to cease operations in the country within 48 hours after over €103 million (approximately $120 million) in bets on the January 18 presidential election results were recorded on its platform. The regulator noted that Polymarket does not hold a Portuguese betting license, and that Portuguese law prohibits betting on the outcomes of real-world events such as politics, allowing only sports betting, casino games, and horse racing. Polymarket is currently still accessible in Portugal, but the regulator may soon require internet service providers to block it. (CoinDesk)

data.title: META's Stock Decline Linked to AI Investment Strategy
data.description: META's stock has experienced a 13% decline over the past six months, reaching a low of approximately $620. According to NS3.AI, this downturn is attributed to the company's aggressive spending on artificial intelligence. Jim Cramer highlights META's substantial investment commitment of $600 billion by 2028 to advance personal superintelligence technology. While this significant expenditure is impacting the stock negatively, there is potential for substantial future gains if the AI initiatives succeed, although the associated risks remain high.

data.title: Trend Research borrowed 30 million USDT from Aave and transferred it to Binance.
data.description: According to Ember Monitoring, after the price of ETH fell below its cost line, Trend Research (1609...fd95) borrowed 30 million USDT from Aave today and transferred it to Binance. This institution has been buying ETH using leverage since November of last year and currently holds 626,000 ETH, worth $1.94 billion, with an average cost of approximately $3,186. It is currently experiencing a paper loss of approximately $50 million. The institution borrowed 1 billion USDT from Aave, with a leverage ratio of 2x.

data.title: Aave's Loan Issuance Nears $1 Trillion Milestone
data.description: Decentralized lending protocol Aave has reported that its cumulative loan issuance from January 2020 to January 2026 is approaching $1 trillion. According to BlockBeats, this significant milestone highlights the growing influence and adoption of decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms in the financial sector. Aave's platform allows users to lend and borrow cryptocurrencies without the need for traditional financial intermediaries, contributing to its rapid growth and widespread use. The protocol's success reflects the increasing demand for decentralized financial services and the potential for further expansion in the coming years.

data.description:
OKX TR announced it will delist certain cryptocurrency pairs in order to maintain trading quality in spot markets. Continue Reading: OKX TR, the Turkish arm of the Bitcoin exchange OKX, has delisted numerous altcoin trading pairs! Here are the details

data.title: Lambda256 Ventures into Security Token and Stablecoin Markets
data.description: Lambda256, the blockchain subsidiary of Dunamu, is making strides into the Security Token Offering (STO) and stablecoin sectors. According to NS3.AI, the company's STO platform was employed by Credo Partners to develop a digital asset system designed for issuing security tokens supported by diverse securities and tangible assets. This platform has been recognized as an innovative financial service within South Korea's Financial Services Commission's regulatory sandbox.

data.title: Hedera's Double Bottom Pattern Indicates Potential Upside
data.description: Hedera (HBAR) is currently exhibiting a double bottom pattern, with a robust support level at $0.102. According to NS3.AI, this formation suggests a potential 31% increase if the cryptocurrency surpasses the $0.135 neckline. The 50-day EMA, positioned around $0.127, serves as a significant resistance point, having previously hindered upward movements. Concurrently, there is a noticeable rise in ETF inflows and spot demand, indicating heightened interest from both institutional and retail investors. These factors make the forthcoming price developments crucial for Hedera.

data.title: Investors Turn to Precious Metals Amid Rising Risks in Early 2026
data.description: In early 2026, investors are shifting their focus from Bitcoin and Ethereum to precious metals such as gold and silver due to increasing institutional and governance risks. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin and Ethereum are being traded more like USD-denominated, high-volatility risk assets, which are closely linked to dollar liquidity and leverage. In contrast, gold maintains an 'independence premium' as a hard asset, less influenced by uncertainties in monetary policy. This trend is evident in the rising prices of precious metals and the bearish options positioning for major cryptocurrencies.

data.title: What Ethereum’s Institutional Timeline Reveals About Market Structure
data.description:
Ethereum’s weekly chart is presented as a sequence of time-based phases rather than isolated price movements. The structure links price action with institutional and regulatory developments, showing how different periods reflect shifts in positioning and demand. By segmenting the timeline, the chart connects specific weekly candles to events that shaped Ethereum’s first clear institutional narrative
source: https://www.ethnews.com/what-ethereums-institutional-timeline-reveals-about-market-structure/
